target: Testmaster English learning platform - Major enrichment overhaul features
summary: ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Vocab games rotation per lesson confirmed (L1:4, L2:3, L3:3, L4:3 review games). Grammar games expanded to 5 types confirmed. Speaking shows 3 prompts. New components TrueFalseGrammar, MultipleChoiceGrammar, Crossword, WordSearch, BoardGame all render correctly.

L1_VOCAB_GAMES_4_DIFFERENT.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 4'. First game is Listen & Choose Picture.

L2_VOCAB_GAMES_3_DIFFERENT.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 3'. First game is Listen & Write.

L3_VOCAB_GAMES_3_DIFFERENT.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 3'. First game is Memory Game with card grid.

L4_VOCAB_GAMES_REVIEW.description: L4 shows 3 review games: crossword, word_search, board_game
L4_VOCAB_GAMES_REVIEW.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 3'. Cycled through all 3 games.

games_confirmed.crossword: Grid with Across/Down clues and Check Answers button
games_confirmed.word_search: 10x10 letter grid with 'Words to Find' list (8 words)
games_confirmed.board_game: GO→1→2→...→8→Star path with dice and 'Tap to roll' instruction

GRAMMAR_GAMES_5_TYPES.description: Grammar games section shows 5 game types for all lessons
GRAMMAR_GAMES_5_TYPES.evidence: Badge shows 'Grammar Game 1 of 5'. Cycled through all 5 types.

games_confirmed.1: WordOrder - Arrange words with tiles (?, Who, is, he)
games_confirmed.2: FillTheBlank - 'Who ___ he?' with 4 options (are, be, am, is)
games_confirmed.3: ErrorHunter - 'Him is my friend.' tap to find error
games_confirmed.4: TrueFalseGrammar - 'Who is he?' with Correct/Incorrect buttons

TRUE_FALSE_GRAMMAR_COMPONENT.description: New TrueFalseGrammar component renders with True/False buttons
TRUE_FALSE_GRAMMAR_COMPONENT.evidence: Game 4 of 5 shows 'True or False?' badge with ThumbsUp 'Correct' and ThumbsDown 'Incorrect' buttons

MULTIPLE_CHOICE_GRAMMAR_COMPONENT.description: New MultipleChoiceGrammar component renders with 4 options and blank fill
MULTIPLE_CHOICE_GRAMMAR_COMPONENT.evidence: Game 5 of 5 shows 'Choose the Right Word' with sentence 'Who ___ he?' and 2x2 option grid (is, be, am, are)

CROSSWORD_COMPONENT.description: Crossword game renders grid with clues
CROSSWORD_COMPONENT.evidence: L4 Game 1: Grid3X3 icon, numbered cells, Across (2 clues) and Down (6 clues) sections, Check Answers/Reveal All buttons

WORD_SEARCH_COMPONENT.description: WordSearch game renders letter grid with word list
WORD_SEARCH_COMPONENT.evidence: L4 Game 2: Search icon, 10x10 letter grid, 'Words to Find' list with 8 vocabulary words and definitions

BOARD_GAME_COMPONENT.description: BoardGame renders dice and board path
BOARD_GAME_COMPONENT.evidence: L4 Game 3: Trophy icon, board path GO→1→2→3→4→5→6→7→8→Star, clickable dice, 'Tap the dice to roll!' instruction

SPEAKING_3_PROMPTS.description: Speaking section shows 3 prompts with counter
SPEAKING_3_PROMPTS.evidence: Counter shows '1/3', prompt 'Say: Hello! I can listen.' with recording button and Skip to advance

ERROR_HUNTER_DIVERSE_ERRORS.description: Error Hunter handles diverse error types (not just is/are)
ERROR_HUNTER_DIVERSE_ERRORS.evidence: Component supports: exact match, punctuation-stripped match, short error words, pronoun errors like 'Him is my friend'

component_verification.TrueFalseGrammar.js: NEW - renders sentence with Correct/Incorrect buttons, feedback, scoring
component_verification.MultipleChoiceGrammar.js: NEW - renders question with blank and 4-option grid
component_verification.Crossword.js: NEW - builds grid from words, Across/Down clues, Check/Reveal functionality
component_verification.WordSearch.js: NEW - builds 10x10 grid, highlights found words, words list with definitions
component_verification.BoardGame.js: NEW - dice rolling, board path, question answering game flow

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new game components properly exported in index files
Grammar games index exports selectGrammarGamesForLesson with gameCount=5
VocabGamesPlayer correctly uses games array from enrichment
GrammarGamesPlayer correctly iterates through all game types with switch statement
ErrorHunter handles diverse error detection with multiple comparison methods
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing lesson content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified all enrichment overhaul features: L1 has 4 vocab games (listen_choose_picture first), L2 has 3 (listen_write first), L3 has 3 (memory_game first), L4 has 3 review games (crossword, word_search, board_game). Grammar games have 5 types (word_order, fill_blank, error_hunter, true_false, multiple_choice_grammar). Speaking shows 3 prompts with 1/3 counter. All new components render correctly with proper UI elements.
